mapper.select: SELECT pr.code FROM staff_account_platform_role sapr JOIN platform_role pr ON sapr.platform_role_id = pr.id WHERE sapr.staff_account_id = #{staffAccountId}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sapr.staff_account_id) FROM staff_account_platform_role sapr JOIN platform_role pr ON pr.id = sapr.platform_role_id JOIN staff_account sa ON sa.id = sapr.staff_account_id WHERE pr.code = 'platform_admin' AND sa.status = 'active' AND sapr.staff_account_id <> #{staffAccountId}
SELECT id FROM platform_role WHERE code = #{code} LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT dr.code FROM domain_member dm JOIN domain_member_role dmr ON dmr.domain_member_id = dm.id JOIN domain_role dr ON dr.id = dmr.domain_role_id WHERE dm.staff_account_id = #{staffAccountId} AND dm.business_domain_id = #{businessDomainId} AND dm.deleted_at IS NULL
